descriptions.japanese: 呪文を除外してアップグレード。

descriptions.english: [annihilate] this card. Deal damage to your Pyre equal to 10% of its current health. Draw [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power] cards and apply -[effect0.upgrade.trait1.upgrade.costreductionabs][ember].
descriptions.french: Purgezcette carte. Infligez à votre Brasier des dégâts valant 10 % de ses PV actuels. Piochez [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power] cartes et appliquez -[effect0.upgrade.trait1.upgrade.costreductionabs][ember].
descriptions.german: Verbanne diese Karte. Füge der Höllenglut Schaden in der Höhe von 10 % ihrer aktuellen Gesundheit zu. Ziehe [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power] Karten und wende -[effect0.upgrade.trait1.upgrade.costreductionabs][ember] an.
descriptions.russian: [annihilate] этой карты. Наносит Пеклу урон, равный 10% от текущего здоровья. Вытягивает карты ([effect0.upgrade.trait1.power]) и применяет -[effect0.upgrade.trait1.upgrade.costreductionabs][ember].
descriptions.portuguese: Expurga esta carta. Causa dano à sua Pira igual a 10% da vida atual dela. Compra [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power] cartas e aplica -[effect0.upgrade.trait1.upgrade.costreductionabs][ember].
descriptions.chinese: [annihilate] 此卡牌。对你的薪火造成其当前生命值 10% 的伤害。抽 [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power] 张牌并施加 -[effect0.upgrade.trait1.upgrade.costreductionabs][ember]。
descriptions.spanish: [annihilate] esta carta. Inflige tanto daño a tu Pira como el 10 % de su salud actual. Roba [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power] cartas y añade -[effect0.upgrade.trait1.upgrade.costreductionabs][ember].
descriptions.chinese_traditional: [annihilate]此卡。對你的火堆造成等同於其目前生命值10%的傷害。抽[effect0.upgrade.trait1.power]張牌並施加-[effect0.upgrade.trait1.upgrade.costreductionabs][ember]。
descriptions.korean: 이 카드를 [annihilate]합니다. 현재 체력의 10%만큼 화로에 피해를 줍니다. 카드를 [effect0.upgrade.trait1.power]장 뽑고 -[effect0.upgrade.trait1.upgrade.costreductionabs][ember]을 적용합니다.
descriptions.japanese: このカードを[annihilate]する。自軍の炉に現在の体力の10%分のダメージを与える。カードを[effect0.upgrade.trait1.power]枚ドローして-[effect0.upgrade.trait1.upgrade.costreductionabs][ember]を付与する。
